text: Acme Corp asked for pricing again — third time this week. They want to close before end of quarter.
Following up on the pilot. Our team loved the demo. What does onboarding look like?
Prospect repeatedly flagged that integration with their CRM is the deciding factor. Budget approved, decision in 2 weeks.
Upcoming: technical deep dive with Northwind eng team, Monday 10am.
Reminder: standup moved to 11. Coffee machine on 2nd floor is fixed.
